text_original: The (state of) vacancy should be brought to the utmost degree, and that of stillness guarded with unwearying vigour.
text_normalized: The (state of) vacancy should be brought to the utmost degree, and that of stillness guarded with unwearying vigour.

text_original: All things alike go through their processes of activity, and (then) we see them return (to their original state).
text_normalized: All things alike go through their processes of activity, and (then) we see them return (to their original state).

text_original: When things (in the vegetable world) have displayed their luxuriant growth, we see each of them return to its root.
text_normalized: When things (in the vegetable world) have displayed their luxuriant growth, we see each of them return to its root.

text_original: This returning to their root is what we call the state of stillness;
text_normalized: This returning to their root is what we call the state of stillness;

text_original: and that stillness may be called a reporting that they have fulfilled their appointed end.
text_normalized: and that stillness may be called a reporting that they have fulfilled their appointed end.

text_original: The report of that fulfilment is the regular, unchanging rule.
text_normalized: The report of that fulfilment is the regular, unchanging rule.

text_original: To know that unchanging rule is to be intelligent;
text_normalized: To know that unchanging rule is to be intelligent;

text_original: not to know it leads to wild movements and evil issues.
text_normalized: not to know it leads to wild movements and evil issues.

text_original: The knowledge of that unchanging rule produces a (grand) capacity and forbearance, and that capacity and forbearance lead to a community (of feeling with all things).
text_normalized: The knowledge of that unchanging rule produces a (grand) capacity and forbearance, and that capacity and forbearance lead to a community (of feeling with all things).

text_original: From this community of feeling comes a kingliness of character;
text_normalized: From this community of feeling comes a kingliness of character;

text_original: and he who is king-like goes on to be heaven-like.
text_normalized: and he who is king-like goes on to be heaven-like.

text_original: In that likeness to heaven he possesses the Dao.
text_normalized: In that likeness to heaven he possesses the Dao.

text_original: Possessed of the Dao, he endures long;
text_normalized: Possessed of the Dao, he endures long;

text_original: and to the end of his bodily life, is exempt from all danger of decay.
text_normalized: and to the end of his bodily life, is exempt from all danger of decay.
